mapper.sql: warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, modelno, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, ppl, project_code, sales_info_no, inventory_property_id, qty_normal, preqty_normal, qty_w, preqty_w, qty_product, preqty_product, qty_db, preqty_db, qty_cg, preqty_cg
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.inv_normal
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.inv_normal (warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, modelno, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, ppl, project_code, sales_info_no, inventory_property_id, qty_normal, preqty_normal, qty_w, preqty_w, qty_product, preqty_product, qty_db, preqty_db, qty_cg, preqty_cg ) values (#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{qtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preqtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preqtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preqtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preqtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preqtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into dbo.inv_normal
warehouse_code,
warehouse_name,
warehouse_type,
modelno,
inventory_type_code,
customer_no,
group_customer_no,

preqty_w,

preqty_product,
qty_db,
preqty_db,
qty_cg,
preqty_cg,

mapper.update:
update dbo.inv_normal
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
qty_normal = #{record.qtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
preqty_normal = #{record.preqtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_w = #{record.qtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER},
preqty_w = #{record.preqtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_product = #{record.qtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER},
preqty_product = #{record.preqtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_db = #{record.qtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER},
preqty_db = #{record.preqtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_cg = #{record.qtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER},
preqty_cg = #{record.preqtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.inv_normal set warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, qty_normal = #{record.qtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, preqty_normal = #{record.preqtyNormal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_w = #{record.qtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER}, preqty_w = #{record.preqtyW,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_product = #{record.qtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER}, preqty_product = #{record.preqtyProduct,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_db = #{record.qtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER}, preqty_db = #{record.preqtyDb,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_cg = #{record.qtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER}, preqty_cg = #{record.preqtyCg,jdbcType=INTEGER}
